data.title: Bank of Communications Announces Final Dividend Details for 2024
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Bank of Communications Co ( (HK:3328) ).

Bank of Communications Co., Ltd has announced an update regarding its proposed final cash dividend for the year ending December 31, 2024. The update includes details on the ex-dividend date, record date, and payment date, with the dividend declared at RMB 0.197 per share. This announcement is significant for shareholders as it provides clarity on the timeline for dividend distribution, potentially impacting investor decisions and market perceptions of the company’s financial health.

More about Bank of Communications Co

Bank of Communications Co., Ltd is a major financial institution operating in the banking industry, providing a range of financial services including personal and corporate banking, wealth management, and investment services. It primarily focuses on the Chinese market and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Seazen Group Announces Board Restructuring with Key Appointments
data.description:
Seazen Group Ltd. ( (HK:1030) ) has shared an update.

Seazen Group Limited announced significant changes in its board structure, with the resignation of Mr. Zhang Shengman as a non-executive director and ESG committee member, effective April 1, 2025. Mr. Zhang leaves to pursue other endeavors, with no disagreements reported. Concurrently, Mr. Zhou Fudong has been appointed as an executive director and ESG committee member, bringing nearly 20 years of financial management experience to the role. Mr. Zhou’s extensive background within the company and prior roles at prestigious firms like PricewaterhouseCoopers and Baker Tilly China positions him well to contribute to Seazen’s strategic goals. These changes reflect the company’s ongoing commitment to strengthening its governance and leadership team.

More about Seazen Group Ltd.

Seazen Group Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the real estate industry with a focus on property development and management. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and engages in various environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives.

YTD Price Performance: 15.93%

Average Trading Volume: 22,944,160

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$14.85B

data.title: Glennon Small Companies Ltd Announces NTA Figures for March 2025
data.description:
Glennon Small Companies Ltd ( (AU:GC1) ) has provided an announcement.

Glennon Small Companies Limited, listed on the ASX, has announced its unaudited Net Tangible Assets (NTA) figures as of March 27, 2025. The NTA before tax is reported at $0.7556 per share, while the NTA after tax is $0.7302 per share. This announcement provides stakeholders with an insight into the company’s financial standing, highlighting the impact of deferred tax assets and selling costs on its valuation.

data.title: Pozzi Milano Reports Strong 2024 Financial Performance Amidst Challenging Market Conditions
data.description:
Pozzi Milano S.P.A. ( (IT:POZ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Pozzi Milano S.P.A. reported a positive financial performance for 2024, with revenues increasing by 9.1% to €19.8 million despite a challenging macroeconomic environment. The company achieved a cash-positive financial position and improved net equity, driven by strategic international growth and the acquisition of Venditio, which strengthens its market presence in France. This performance underscores the resilience of Pozzi Milano’s business model and its strategic focus on international expansion.

More about Pozzi Milano S.P.A.

Pozzi Milano S.P.A. operates in the table fashion sector and owns the ‘EasyLife’ brand, along with ‘Pozzi’ and ‘Castello Pozzi’ brands through its subsidiary Pozzi Brand Diffusion S.r.l. The company focuses on international markets, with a significant presence in Western Europe and growing operations in the Americas.

YTD Price Performance: 9.07%

Average Trading Volume: 27,685

data.title: Singular Health Releases Shares from Escrow, Maintains Capital Structure
data.description:
Singular Health Group Ltd ( (AU:SHG) ) has shared an update.

Singular Health Group Ltd announced the release of 200,000 fully paid ordinary shares from voluntary escrow, effective 28 March 2025. This release does not alter the company’s issued capital, indicating a stable financial position. The move could enhance liquidity and investor confidence without impacting the company’s capital structure.

More about Singular Health Group Ltd

Singular Health is a Western Australian, ASX-listed medical technology company focused on creating an integrated healthcare ecosystem. The company aims to enhance the value of medical imaging records, promoting interoperability and improving patient outcomes. Its 3Dicom software solutions enable better visualization and understanding of medical imaging data, with 3Dicom MD cleared for diagnostic use in the United States.

data.title: Hatten Land Limited Provides Monthly Update Under Judicial Management
data.description:
The latest update is out from Hatten Land Limited ( (SG:PH0) ).

Hatten Land Limited, under judicial management, has announced that there have been no material changes in its affairs since the last update in February 2025. The company’s shares have been suspended since August 2024, and stakeholders are advised to stay informed through announcements and seek professional advice regarding their shares.

More about Hatten Land Limited

Hatten Land Limited is a company incorporated in Singapore, currently under judicial management. The company, along with its subsidiaries, operates in the real estate industry, focusing on property development and management.

data.title: Pioneer Lithium Expands into Uranium with Strategic Acquisitions
data.description:
An announcement from Pioneer Lithium Limited ( (AU:PLN) ) is now available.

Pioneer Lithium Limited has completed the acquisition of two significant uranium projects, the Skull Creek Uranium Project in Colorado, USA, and the Warmbad Uranium Project in Namibia, Africa. These acquisitions are part of Pioneer’s strategy to diversify its portfolio into critical energy minerals, enhancing its position in the energy sector. The Skull Creek project benefits from existing infrastructure and has potential for significant uranium mineralization, while the Warmbad project, located in a supportive mining jurisdiction, offers significant exploration potential due to its geological similarities to world-class uranium deposits.

More about Pioneer Lithium Limited

Pioneer Lithium Limited is a company focused on the exploration and development of critical energy minerals. It operates primarily in the mining industry, with a market focus on lithium and uranium projects.

YTD Price Performance: -35.00%

Average Trading Volume: 46,731

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy
